specification.description:
Requirement TITLE: App REQUIREMENT-ID: spec.app.App
Insert REQUIREMENT-ID into any source code for cross reference purposes.
It is important that error handling be done excellently. If a function can fail, then it needs to do so in the most elegant way possible. Error reporting, handling, exceptions and all aspects of failure must be taken to extreme. It should be possible to understand the program by reading the error messages.
specification.notes: This program should emit the string "Hello, world!" to the terminal.

specification.description:
Feature Specification: CmdLine
It is important that error handling be done excellently. If a function can fail, then it needs to do so in the most elegant way possible. Error reporting, handling, exceptions and all aspects of failure must be taken to extreme. It should be possible to understand the program by reading the error messages.
specification.notes: This program does not take any command line arguments.
